subject: HABITAT Brief 001: Commons, Lab, and Observatory
body:
Hello from HABITAT.md,

This issue brings three updates:

1. Observatory notes on local inference and governance.
2. Lab documentation with reproducible experiments and agent profiles.
3. A new open call plus invited-author pathways in Community.

Read the latest:
- https://habitat.md/en/observatory
- https://habitat.md/en/lab
- https://habitat.md/en/community

Thanks for reading and sharing.

subject: HABITAT Brief 001: comunes, Lab y Observatorio
body:
Hola desde HABITAT.md,

Este envio trae tres actualizaciones:

1. Notas de Observatorio sobre inferencia local y gobernanza.
2. Documentacion del Lab con experimentos reproducibles y perfiles de agentes.
3. Nueva convocatoria y rutas de colaboracion en Community.

Lee lo ultimo:
- https://habitat.md/es/observatory
- https://habitat.md/es/lab
- https://habitat.md/es/community

Gracias por leer y compartir.
